mapper.select:
SELECT a.PRDCT_TIME as 'DATE', ROUND(a.PUMP_PWR_PRDCT+COALESCE(sunPWR,0)+COALESCE(essPWR,0) , 2) AS PRDCT_PWR, COALESCE(c.all_pwq+g.ESS_VALUE+f.SUN_VALUE, 0) AS PWR, CASE WHEN a.PUMP_PWR_PRDCT >= b.peak THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS 'PEAK_YN' FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.PRDCT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME, SUM(t.PWR_PRDCT) AS PUMP_PWR_PRDCT FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST t INNER JOIN ( SELECT PRDCT_TIME, PUMP_GRP, MAX(ANLY_TIME) AS MaxANLY_TIME FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST GROUP BY PRDCT_TIME, PUMP_GRP ) AS max_times ON t.PRDCT_TIME = max_times.PRDCT_TIME AND t.ANLY_TIME = max_times.MaxANLY_TIME AND t.PUMP_GRP = max_times.PUMP_GRP WHERE t.PRDCT_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND t.PRDCT_TIME < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.PRDCT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rhi.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') as TS, SUM(rhi.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE) AS all_pwq FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rhi, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rhi.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND rhi.TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rhi.TS < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 0 HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(rhi.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
) c ON a.PRDCT_TIME = c.TS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT value AS 'peak' FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag = (SELECT TAG FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE func_typ = 'selectPeakGoal') ) b ON 1=1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d '), TIME) as TS, AveragePower as 'ALL_AVG_PWR' FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00:00') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND rdh.VALUE > 0 AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY ts ) a GROUP BY TIME ) aa ) d ON DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i') = DATE_FORMAT(d.TS, '%H:%i')
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rdh.TAGNAME, ROUND(rdh.VALUE,2) as 'SUN_VALUE', DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts , '%H:00') as timeOnly FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.CLSFC ='태양광' AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) )f ON DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i') = f.timeOnly
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rdh.TAGNAME, ROUND(ABS(rdh.VALUE),2) as 'ESS_VALUE', DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts , '%H:00') as timeOnly FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.CLSFC ='ESS' AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) )g ON DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i') = g.timeOnly
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TIME as TS, AveragePower as sunPWR FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00:00.000') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.CLSFC ='태양광' AND rdh.VALUE > 0 AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY DATETIME ) a GROUP BY TIME ) t5a ) t5_1 on DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i:00') = t5_1.TS
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TIME as TS, AveragePower as essPWR FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00:00.000') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.CLSFC ='ESS' AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY DATETIME ) a GROUP BY TIME ) t5a ) t5_2 on DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i:00') = t5_2.TS
ORDER BY a.PRDCT_TIME

SELECT a.PRDCT_TIME as 'DATE', ROUND(a.PUMP_PWR_PRDCT+COALESCE(sunPWR,0)+COALESCE(essPWR,0) , 2) AS PRDCT_PWR, COALESCE(c.all_pwq+g.ESS_VALUE+f.SUN_VALUE, 0) AS PWR, CASE WHEN a.PUMP_PWR_PRDCT >= b.peak THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS 'PEAK_YN' FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.PRDCT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME, SUM(t.PWR_PRDCT) AS PUMP_PWR_PRDCT FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST t INNER JOIN ( SELECT PRDCT_TIME, PUMP_GRP, MAX(ANLY_TIME) AS MaxANLY_TIME FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST GROUP BY PRDCT_TIME, PUMP_GRP ) AS max_times ON t.PRDCT_TIME = max_times.PRDCT_TIME AND t.ANLY_TIME = max_times.MaxANLY_TIME AND t.PUMP_GRP = max_times.PUMP_GRP WHERE t.PRDCT_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND t.PRDCT_TIME < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.PRDCT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rhi.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') as TS, SUM(rhi.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE) AS all_pwq FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rhi, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rhi.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND rhi.TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rhi.TS < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 0 HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(rhi.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
) c ON a.PRDCT_TIME = c.TS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT value AS 'peak' FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag = (SELECT TAG FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE func_typ = 'selectPeakGoal') ) b ON 1=1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d '), TIME) as TS, AveragePower as 'ALL_AVG_PWR' FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00:00') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND rdh.VALUE > 0 AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY ts ) a GROUP BY TIME ) aa ) d ON DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i') = DATE_FORMAT(d.TS, '%H:%i')
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rdh.TAGNAME, ROUND(rdh.VALUE,2) as 'SUN_VALUE', DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts , '%H:00') as timeOnly FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.CLSFC ='태양광' AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) )f ON DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i') = f.timeOnly
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rdh.TAGNAME, ROUND(ABS(rdh.VALUE),2) as 'ESS_VALUE', DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts , '%H:00') as timeOnly FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.CLSFC ='ESS' AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) )g ON DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i') = g.timeOnly
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TIME as TS, AveragePower as sunPWR FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00:00.000') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.CLSFC ='태양광' AND rdh.VALUE > 0 AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY DATETIME ) a GROUP BY TIME ) t5a ) t5_1 on DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i:00') = t5_1.TS
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TIME as TS, AveragePower as essPWR FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00:00.000') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.CLSFC ='ESS' AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY DATETIME ) a GROUP BY TIME ) t5a ) t5_2 on DATE_FORMAT(a.PRDCT_TIME, '%H:%i:00') = t5_2.TS
ORDER BY a.PRDCT_TIME

SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%m-%d %H') , ':00') as DATE, DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%H') as TIME, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND rdh.ts >= #{start_date} AND rdh.ts <= #{end_date} ) a GROUP BY ts

SELECT TIME as DATE, AveragePower as PWR FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATETIME, '%H:00') as TIME, MAX(DATE) as DATE, ROUND(AVG(PWR), 2) as AveragePower FROM ( SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00') as DATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ts), '%Y-%m-%d') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' AND rdh.VALUE > 0 AND rdh.ts >= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) AND rdh.ts <= DATE_SUB( DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), INTERVAL 18 HOUR) ) a GROUP BY ts ) a GROUP BY TIME ) b

SELECT concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ts, INTERVAL 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00') as DATE, SUM(Y) PWR FROM ( SELECT ts, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and rdh.ts >=concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') ,' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:00') ) a GROUP BY ts

select rtr.ANLY_DATE, rtr.DATA_BS_YMNTH, rtr.RATE_IDX, rtr.DATA_MSN_PRCNT, FORMAT (rtr.TOT_PWR,0) TOT_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.TOT_FEE,0) TOT_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.BASE_FEE,0) BASE_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.ETC_FEE,0) ETC_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.L_PWR,0) L_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.M_PWR,0) M_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.H_PWR,0) H_PWR, FORMAT (rtr.L_ELCTR_FEE,0) L_ELCTR_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.M_ELCTR_FEE,0) M_ELCTR_FEE, FORMAT (rtr.H_ELCTR_FEE,0) H_ELCTR_FEE, rtr.DC_NMB, DATE_FORMAT(rtr.RGSTR_TIME,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as RGSTR_TIME, rtr.FLAG, rmi.LARGE_CTGRY, rmi.MIDDLE_CTGRY, rmi.SMALL_CTGRY, FORMAT (rpr.PWR,0) PWR from TB_RT_RATE_RST rtr, TB_RT_MSTR_INF rmi, TB_RT_POWER_RST rpr where rtr.rate_idx = rmi.rate_idx AND rtr.DATA_BS_YMNTH = rpr.DATA_BS_YMNTH AND rtr.ANLY_DATE = rpr.ANLY_DATE AND rmi.USE_YN = '1'
AND rtr.ANLY_DATE = (SELECT MAX(ANLY_DATE) ANLY FROM TB_RT_RATE_RST WHERE DATA_BS_YMNTH = #{ymnth}) and rtr.DATA_BS_YMNTH=#{ymnth}

select cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC, (select value from TB_RAWDATA_HOUR where tagname = cppi.PRI_D_TAG order by ts desc limit 1) * 0.85 as TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, (select value from TB_RAWDATA_HOUR where tagname = cppi.FRI_TAG order by ts desc limit 1) * 1.08 as PRDCT_MEAN, (select value from TB_RAWDATA_HOUR where tagname = cppi.PWI_TAG order by ts desc limit 1) * 0.92 as PWR_PRDCT, 1440 as PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, 0 as PUMP_YN, 0 as FREQ, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') as ANLY_TIME, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') as PRDCT_TIME from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi where cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}

select ctr.OPT_IDX, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, ctr.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC, DATE_FORMAT(ctr.ANLY_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ANLY_TIME, DATE_FORMAT(ctr.PRDCT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') PRDCT_TIME, ctr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, ctr.PRDCT_MEAN, ctr.PRDCT_STD, ROUND(ctr.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, 2) TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, ROUND(ctr.PWR_PRDCT, 2) PWR_PRDCT, DATE_FORMAT(ctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') RGSTR_TIME, ctr.PUMP_YN, ctr.FREQ, ctr.FLAG, ctr.DC_NMB from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, ( SELECT cor.OPT_IDX, cpr.PUMP_IDX, cor.ANLY_TIME, cor.PRDCT_TIME, cor.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, cor.PUMP_GRP, cor.PRDCT_MEAN, cor.PRDCT_STD, cor.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, cor.PWR_PRDCT, cor.RGSTR_TIME, cor.DC_NMB, cor.FLAG, cpr.PUMP_YN, cpr.FREQ FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST cpr, TB_CTR_OPT_RST cor where cor.OPT_IDX = cpr.OPT_IDX AND cor.PUMP_GRP = cpr.PUMP_GRP AND cor.PRDCT_TIME > concat(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND cor.PRDCT_TIME < concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND cor.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND cor.ANLY_TIME = ( SELECT MAX(ANLY_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PRDCT_TIME > concat(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND PRDCT_TIME < concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} ) AND cor.PRDCT_TIME = ( SELECT MAX(PRDCT_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PRDCT_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 MINUTE) AND PRDCT_TIME <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 MINUTE) AND PRDCT_TIME > concat(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND PRDCT_TIME < concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00')
AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} ) ) ctr where ctr.PUMP_IDX = cppi.PUMP_IDX AND cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND LEI_IDX = 1 ORDER BY ctr.ANLY_TIME,ctr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF

SELECT DISTINCT cor.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST cor JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi ON cor.PUMP_GRP = tcppi.PUMP_GRP WHERE cor.PRDCT_TIME > CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{nowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND cor.PRDCT_TIME < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{nowDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') order by cor.PUMP_GRP

SELECT DISTINCT cpr.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST cpr JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi ON cpr.PUMP_GRP = tcppi.PUMP_GRP WHERE cpr.RGSTR_TIME > CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{nowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND cpr.RGSTR_TIME < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{nowDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') order by cpr.PUMP_GRP

select ctr.OPT_IDX, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, ctr.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC, DATE_FORMAT(ctr.ANLY_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ANLY_TIME, DATE_FORMAT(ctr.PRDCT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') PRDCT_TIME, ctr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, ctr.PRDCT_MEAN, ctr.PRDCT_STD, ROUND(ctr.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, 2) TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, ROUND(ctr.PWR_PRDCT, 2) PWR_PRDCT, DATE_FORMAT(ctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') RGSTR_TIME, ctr.PUMP_YN, ctr.FREQ, ctr.FLAG, ctr.DC_NMB from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, ( SELECT cor.OPT_IDX, cpr.PUMP_IDX, cor.ANLY_TIME, cor.PRDCT_TIME, cor.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, cor.PUMP_GRP, cor.PRDCT_MEAN, cor.PRDCT_STD, cor.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, cor.PWR_PRDCT, cor.RGSTR_TIME, cor.DC_NMB, cor.FLAG, cpr.PUMP_YN, cpr.FREQ FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST cpr, TB_CTR_OPT_RST cor where cor.OPT_IDX = cpr.OPT_IDX AND cor.PUMP_GRP = cpr.PUMP_GRP AND cor.PRDCT_TIME > concat(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND cor.PRDCT_TIME < concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND cor.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND cor.ANLY_TIME = ( SELECT MAX(ANLY_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PRDCT_TIME > concat(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND PRDCT_TIME < concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} ) ) ctr where ctr.PUMP_IDX = cppi.PUMP_IDX AND cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND LEI_IDX = 1 ORDER BY ctr.ANLY_TIME,ctr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF

select cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC, concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(rdh.ts, INTERVAL 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00') as PRDCT_TIME, format(SUM(rdh.value * 1.08), 2) as PRDCT_MEAN from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh where cppi.FRI_TAG = rdh.tagname and rdh.ts >=concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') ,' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:00') AND cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} group by cppi.PUMP_GRP ,rdh.ts

select cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC, concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(rdh.ts, INTERVAL 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00') as PRDCT_TIME, format(SUM(rdh.value * 0.85), 2) as TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh where cppi.PRI_D_TAG = rdh.tagname and rdh.ts >=concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') ,' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:00') AND cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} group by cppi.PUMP_GRP ,rdh.ts

select cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC, concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(rdh.ts, INTERVAL 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d %H') , ':00') as PRDCT_TIME, format(SUM(rdh.value * 0.92), 2) as PWR_PRDCT from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh where cppi.PWI_TAG = rdh.tagname and rdh.ts >=concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') ,' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 day), '%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:00') AND cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} group by cppi.PUMP_GRP ,rdh.ts

select tgi.TNK_GRP_IDX, tgi.TNK_IDX, tgi.VLV_IDX, tgi.TNK_GRP_NM, tgi.TNK_NM, tgi.PUMP_GRP, tgi.PUMP_GRP_NM, DATE_FORMAT(rd.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS ts, rd.tagname, CASE WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.IN_FO_TAG THEN '유입밸브 열림' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.OUT_FO_TAG THEN '유출밸브 열림' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.IN_FC_TAG THEN '유입밸브 닫힘' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.OUT_FC_TAG THEN '유출밸브 닫힘' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.IN_POI_TAG THEN '유입밸브 개도율' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.OUT_POI_TAG THEN '유출밸브 개도율' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.LEI_TAG THEN '수위' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.IN_FLW_TAG THEN '유입유량' WHEN rd.tagname = tgi.OUT_FLW_TAG THEN '유출유량' ELSE '' END as tag_dcs, rd.value, tgi.DMD_PRI, tgi.LWL_LIM, tgi.HWL_LIM, tgi.MIN_LOAD_LWL, tgi.MAX_LOAD_LWL, tgi.VLM, tgi.LWL, tgi.HWL, tgi.BASE_AREA, tgi.USE_YN FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_TNK_GRP_INF tgi where rd.tagname in (tgi.IN_FO_TAG, tgi.OUT_FO_TAG, tgi.IN_FC_TAG, tgi.OUT_FC_TAG, tgi.IN_POI_TAG, tgi.OUT_POI_TAG, tgi.LEI_TAG, tgi.IN_FLW_TAG, tgi.OUT_FLW_TAG) AND rd.ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE ts >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 DAY)) AND tgi.USE_YN='1' AND tgi.TNK_TYP='1' GROUP BY rd.tagname ORDER BY tgi.TNK_GRP_IDX, tgi.TNK_IDX ASC

select cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_NM, DATE_FORMAT(rd.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS ts, rd.tagname, CASE WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%PMB%' THEN '펌프가동상태' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%SPI%' THEN '펌프주파수SPI' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%CTI%' THEN '펌프주파수CTI' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%PRI%' THEN '펌프관압' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%FRI%' THEN '펌프유량' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%PWI%' THEN '펌프소비전력(kW)' WHEN rd.tagname = cppi.EMS_MIN_WPP_TAG THEN '최소요구관압정수장' WHEN rd.tagname = cppi.EMS_MIN_WPJ_TAG THEN '최소요구관압분기점' ELSE '' END as tag_dcs, CASE WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%PMB%' THEN 'PMB' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%SPI%' THEN 'SPI' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%CTI%' THEN 'CTI' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%PRI%' THEN 'PRI' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%FRI%' THEN 'FRI' WHEN rd.tagname LIKE '%PWI%' THEN 'PWI' WHEN rd.tagname = cppi.EMS_MIN_WPP_TAG THEN 'EMS_MIN_WPP_TAG' WHEN rd.tagname = cppi.EMS_MIN_WPJ_TAG THEN 'EMS_MIN_WPJ_TAG' ELSE 'None' END as tag_typ, ROUND(rd.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti where rd.tagname in ( cppi.PRI_D_TAG, cppi.SPI_TAG,cppi.CTI_TAG, cppi.FRI_TAG, cppi.FRQ_TAG, cppi.TEI_TAG, cppi.PMB_TAG, cppi.PWI_TAG, cppi.EMS_MIN_WPP_TAG, cppi.EMS_MIN_WPJ_TAG) AND pti.PWI_TAG = cppi.PWI_TAG AND rd.ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE ts >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 DAY)) AND cppi.USE_YN='1' AND cppi.LEI_IDX= 1 and pti.mntr_yn = '1'

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT VALUE ai_onoff FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag IN ('745-617-EMS-1001' ) )a,(
SELECT VALUE ai_onoff_auto FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag IN ('745-617-EMS-1002' ) )b,(
SELECT VALUE ai_onoff_auto_ban FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag IN ('745-617-EMS-1003' ) )c,(
SELECT VALUE ai_onoff_auto_ban_result FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag IN ('745-617-EMS-1004' ) )d,(
SELECT VALUE song_ai_onoff FROM TB_PTR_CTR_INF WHERE tag IN ('745-617-EMS-2001' ) )e
SELECT * FROM TB_TNK_GRP_INF GROUP BY TNK_GRP_NM order by DMD_PRI desc

select DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y') ts, tagname, FORMAT (sum(value) , 2) value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR WHERE
ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
and tagname in ( SELECT LEI_TAG IN_FLW_TAG OUT_FLW_TAG IN_FC_TAG OUT_FC_TAG IN_FO_TAG OUT_FO_TAG PRI_D_TAG PMB_TAG FROM
TB_TNK_GRP_INF
TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF
WHERE TNK_GRP_IDX = #{tnk_grp_idx} GROUP BY LEI_TAG IN_FLW_TAG OUT_FLW_TAG IN_FC_TAG OUT_FC_TAG IN_FO_TAG OUT_FO_TAG PRI_D_TAG PMB_TAG ) GROUP BY ts date(ts) month(ts) year(ts)

SELECT TNK_idx, TNK_NM, TNK_GRP_NM, TNK_GRP_IDX, ts, tagname, SUM(value) as value FROM ( select tgi.TNK_idx, tgi.TNK_NM, tgi.TNK_GRP_NM, tgi.TNK_GRP_IDX, DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ts, tagname, FORMAT (value ,0) value from TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_TNK_GRP_INF tgi WHERE rdh.tagname = tgi.LEI_TAG AND ts >=concat(#{date},' 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{date},' 23:59:00') and tnk_typ = '1' and tgi.USE_YN='1' ) a GROUP BY TNK_GRP_NM, ts

SELECT TNK_idx, TNK_NM, TNK_GRP_IDX, TNK_GRP_NM, ( SELECT SUM(VALUE) FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR WHERE tagname = LEI_TAG AND ts >=concat(#{date},' 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{date},' 23:59:00') ) value, LEI_TAG FROM TB_TNK_GRP_INF WHERE USE_YN = '1' AND TNK_TYP = '1' GROUP BY TNK_GRP_NM

SELECT TNK_idx, TNK_NM, TNK_GRP_IDX, TNK_GRP_NM, ( SELECT SUM( FORMAT (value, 0)) '수위' FROM TB_RAWDATA a WHERE ts = ( select DATE_FORMAT(max(ts),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') from TB_RAWDATA where ts >= DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL -1 MINUTE) AND ts <= (NOW() ) AND tagname IN ( SELECT LEI_TAG FROM TB_TNK_GRP_INF WHERE TNK_GRP_NM = tkgi.TNK_GRP_NM GROUP BY LEI_TAG ) GROUP BY ts ) LEI FROM TB_TNK_GRP_INF tkgi WHERE USE_YN = '1' AND TNK_TYP = '1' GROUP BY TNK_GRP_NM

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y') ts, sum(ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2)) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.PWQ_TAG = cppi.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1'
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
GROUP BY rdh.ts date(rdh.ts) month(rdh.ts) year(rdh.ts)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y') ts, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL ='1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and rdh.value != 0
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
GROUP BY rdh.ts date(rdh.ts) month(rdh.ts) year(rdh.ts)

select DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y.%m') as peak_date, max(value) as value, PWI_UNIT as unit from ( select date_format(rdh.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS ts, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS value, pti.PWI_UNIT from TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh join TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti ON rdh.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG where pti.IS_ALL = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and rdh.value != 0 AND
rdh.ts >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 12 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= LAST_DAY(NOW())
group by rdh.ts ) a GROUP by peak_date order by peak_date

SELECT round(sum(rdh.value * pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE), 2) AS value,
'dayAgo' AS 'range',
'day' AS 'range',
'week' AS 'range',
'month' AS 'range',
'year' AS 'range',
rri.TIMEZONE as 'timezone', rri.ELCTR_RATE as 'rate', ROUND(sum(rdh.value * pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE *rri.ELCTR_RATE), 2) AS cost FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_RT_RATE_INF rri, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG AND pti.IS_ALL = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' AND SUBstring(rdh.ts,12,2) = rri.STN_TM and rri.RATE_IDX ='1' and rri.MNTH = month(CURDATE())
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), ' 23:59:59')
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 23:59:59')
AND rdh.ts >= ADDDATE( CURDATE(), - WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) + 0 ) AND rdh.ts <= ADDDATE( CURDATE(), - WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) + 6 )
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(CURDATE())
AND rdh.ts BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-12-31 23:59:59')
GROUP BY rri.TIMEZONE

SELECT (SELECT concat(PUMP_GRP_DSC,PUMP_GRP_IDX) FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF b WHERE a.tagname = b.PMB_TAG) NAME,value as VALUE FROM TB_RAWDATA a WHERE ts = (select DATE_FORMAT(max(ts),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') from TB_RAWDATA) AND tagname IN ( SELECT pmb_tag FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ts, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PRI_T_TAG, rd.value FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = cppi.PRI_T_TAG and cppi.USE_YN='1' and ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE ts >= DATE_ADD(NOW(),INTERVAL -1 DAY) ) GROUP BY cppi.PRI_T_TAG, cppi.PUMP_GRP

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ts, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.FRI_TAG, rd.value FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = cppi.FRI_TAG and cppi.USE_YN='1' and ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE ts >= DATE_ADD(NOW(),INTERVAL -1 DAY) ) GROUP BY cppi.FRI_TAG, cppi.PUMP_GRP

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ts, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.SPI_TAG, rd.value FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = cppi.SPI_TAG and cppi.USE_YN='1' and ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE ts >= DATE_ADD(NOW(),INTERVAL -1 DAY) ) GROUP BY cppi.SPI_TAG, cppi.PUMP_GRP

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ts, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, COALESCE(ROUND(rd.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2),0) AS 'kW' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = cppi.PWI_TAG AND rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.PWI_TAG = cppi.PWI_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' AND rd.ts = (select DATE_FORMAT(max(ts),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') from TB_RAWDATA)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ts, cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, COALESCE( COALESCE(ROUND(rd.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2),0) AS 'kW' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = cppi.PWI_TAG AND rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.PWI_TAG = cppi.PWI_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' AND rd.ts = (select DATE_FORMAT(max(ts),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') from TB_RAWDATA)

SELECT * FROM ( select COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(ROUND(rd.VALUE * pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2)) AS 'pumpPwi' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND cppi.PWI_TAG = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' and rd.value != 0 AND ts >= (NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AND ts <= NOW() GROUP by rd.ts ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) ,0) AS 'pumpPwi' ) a, ( select COALESCE( (select SUM(ROUND(rd.value*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2)) AS 'allPwi' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND pti.IS_ALL='1' and rd.value != 0 AND ts >= (NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AND ts <= NOW() GROUP by rd.ts ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) ,0) AS 'allPwi' ) b, ( SELECT pwr as 'costPwr' FROM TB_RT_POWER_RST ORDER BY anly_date DESC limit 1 ) c, ( select value AS 'goalPeak' from TB_PTR_CTR_INF where tag = (select tag from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP='selectPeakGoal') ) d

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ts,
cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_TYP, CASE WHEN rd.value = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi WHERE rd.tagname = cppi.PMB_TAG AND rd.ts = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) ORDER BY cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_IDX ASC

SELECT tcpr.OPT_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_GRP_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_TYP as PUMP_TYP, IFNULL(tcpr.FREQ, 0) as FREQ, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, DATE_FORMAT(tcpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END AS PUMP_YN, CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value, CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END as PUMP_YN_VALUE, '1' as 'FLAG', RATE_CTGRY as RATE_CTGRY, FLOW_CTR as FLOW_CTR FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY tcpr join TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi on tcpr.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX
and tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}
where 1=1
AND tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY where RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MINUTE) AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp})
AND tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY where RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MINUTE))
AND tcpr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 5 AND tcpr.FLAG = 0 ORDER BY tcpr.PUMP_IDX ASC

SELECT tcpr.OPT_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_GRP_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_TYP as PUMP_TYP, IFNULL(tcpr.FREQ, 0) as FREQ, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, DATE_FORMAT(tcpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST tcpr join TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi on tcpr.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX and tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} where tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST where PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}) AND tcpr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 5 order by tcpr.PUMP_IDX asc
SELECT cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, CASE WHEN cppi.USE_YN != cppi.PMS_USE_YN THEN "false" ELSE "true" END as flag FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi
SELECT * FROM TB_EMS_ALARM where TIME > date_add(NOW(),interval -1 MINUTE) AND TIME < (NOW() group by alarm_id;

select dsc as dcs, value FROM (SELECT fc.dsc, ROUND(rdh.VALUE * pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA rdh, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_FAC fc, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = ti.tagname AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND ti.USE_YN = '1' AND pti.PWI_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.fac_code = fc.fac_code AND rdh.ts = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) ) AND ti.zone_code = #{zone_code} GROUP BY dsc) a ORDER BY value DESC
select * from TB_TNK_GRP_INF where USE_YN = '1' AND tnk_typ = #{tnk_typ}

select PUMP_IDX, PUMP_GRP, TNK_GRP_IDX, PUMP_GRP_IDX, PUMP_GRP_NM, PUMP_GRP_DSC, PUMP_NM, PUMP_TYP, PUMP_TYP_DSC, EMS_MIN_WPP_TAG, EMS_MIN_WPJ_TAG, DUTY_H, DUTY_Q from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF order by PUMP_GRP_IDX, PUMP_IDX

select CASE when( case WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 0 THEN C0 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 1 THEN C1 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 2 THEN C2 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 3 THEN C3 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 4 THEN C4 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 5 THEN C5 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 6 THEN C6 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 7 THEN C7 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 8 THEN C8 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 9 THEN C9 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 10 THEN C10 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 11 THEN C11 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 12 THEN C12 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 13 THEN C13 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 14 THEN C14 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 15 THEN C15 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 16 THEN C16 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 17 THEN C17 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 18 THEN C18 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 19 THEN C19 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 20 THEN C20 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 21 THEN C21 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 22 THEN C22 WHEN HOUR(NOW())= 23 THEN C23 end ) = 1 then '고압' else '저압' END as opt_mode FROM TB_OPER_INF where ssn = ( SELECT CASE WHEN MONTH(NOW()) BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '봄철' WHEN MONTH(NOW()) BETWEEN 6 AND 8 THEN '여름철' WHEN MONTH(NOW()) BETWEEN 9 AND 11 THEN '가을철' ELSE '겨울철' END )
SELECT * from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE display_id IN ('BP_PRSR', 'MIN_RQRD_TUB')
SELECT PUMP_GRP, PUMP_GRP_NM FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF group by PUMP_GRP order by PUMP_GRP;
SELECT PUMP_GRP, PUMP_GRP_NM FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF WHERE USE_YN = 1 AND PUMP_GRP != 5 group by PUMP_GRP order by PUMP_GRP;

select DATE_FORMAT(cpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , cpr.PRDCT_MEAN, cpr.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, cpr.PWR_PRDCT from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST cpr where cpr.RGSTR_TIME = #{combDate} and cpr.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} and PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = '5' limit 1

select DATE_FORMAT(cpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME, cpr.PUMP_IDX, cpr.PUMP_YN from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST cpr where cpr.RGSTR_TIME = ( SELECT MAX(RGSTR_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PUMP_GRP = # {pump_grp} ) and cpr.PUMP_GRP = # {pump_grp}

select DATE_FORMAT(cpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , cpr.PUMP_IDX, cpr.PUMP_YN from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST cpr where cpr.RGSTR_TIME = #{combDate} and cpr.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} and PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = '5'
select row_number() over(order by TAG asc) as SORT, TAG, TAG_KOR_NM, DEFAULT_VALUE from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP = #{func_type}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ANLY_TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ANLY_TIME FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(RGSTR_TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ANLY_TIME FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST
SELECT pwr as 'COST_PWR', DATE_FORMAT(MAX(anly_date), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ANLY_DATE FROM TB_RT_POWER_RST ORDER BY anly_date DESC limit 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(PRDCT_TIME, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , PRDCT_MEAN as VALUE, TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT as VALUE , ROUND(PWR_PRDCT*1.1,2) as VALUE, PUMP_GRP FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT MAX(RGSTR_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PUMP_GRP= #{pump_grp}) AND PUMP_GRP= #{pump_grp}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(PRDCT_TIME, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME ,
PRDCT_MEAN as VALUE, TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT as VALUE , ROUND(PWR_PRDCT*1.1,2) as VALUE,
PUMP_GRP FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT MAX(RGSTR_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PUMP_GRP= #{pump_grp}) AND PUMP_GRP= #{pump_grp} AND PRDCT_TIME_DIFF=1
SELECT TAG_GRP as PUMP_GRP, DEFAULT_VALUE as AI_STATUS FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'PumpStatus' ORDER BY PUMP_GRP
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WPP_TAG_CODE SET DEFAULT_VALUE = #{STATUS} WHERE TAG_GRP = #{PUMP_GRP} AND FUNC_TYP = 'PumpStatus'
mapper.select: SELECT DATE, TYPE, ROUND(SAVINGCOST, 2) as SAVINGCOST, ROUND(SAVINGKWH, 2) as SAVINGKWH, ROUND(SAVINGCO2, 2) as SAVINGCO2, ROUND(SAVINGUNIT, 2) as SAVINGUNIT FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET WHERE DATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND TYPE != 'mm'
select DEFAULT_VALUE from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where TAG_GRP = 'EMS' and TAG_DSC = 'emerStatus' and TAG_UNIT = #{pumpGrp}

SELECT tcor.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, COALESCE(tcor.PRDCT_MEAN, 0) as PRDCT_MEAN, COALESCE(tcor.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, 0) as TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, ROUND(COALESCE(tcor.PWR_PRDCT*1.1, 0),2) as PWR_PRDCT FROM TB_CTR_OPT_RST tcor where tcor.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_OPT_RST WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}) AND tcor.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 1 AND tcor.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp};

SELECT tcpr.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_GRP_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, COALESCE(tcpr.FREQ, 0) as FREQ, tcpr.PUMP_TYP as PUMP_TYP, tcpr.PUMP_YN as PUMP_YN FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST tcpr
join TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi on tcpr.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX where tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}) AND tcpr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 5 AND tcpr.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp};

select DATE_FORMAT(hct.TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as 'ORDER_TIME' , cppi.PUMP_NM, hct.TAG, CASE WHEN hct.ANLY_CD = 'RUN' THEN '가동' WHEN hct.ANLY_CD = 'STOP' THEN '중지' WHEN hct.ANLY_CD = 'FREQ' THEN CONCAT('주파수(', CAST(hct.VALUE AS CHAR), ')') ELSE 'None' END as ANLY_CD, CASE WHEN hct.FLAG = '0' THEN '전송 등록' WHEN hct.FLAG = '1' THEN '전송 완료' WHEN hct.FLAG = '2' THEN '제어 완료' ELSE '취소' END as FLAG, DATE_FORMAT(hct.UPDT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as UPDT_TIME, CASE WHEN wtc.DEFAULT_VALUE = 0 THEN 'AI운전' WHEN wtc.DEFAULT_VALUE = 1 THEN 'AI추천' ELSE 'AI분석' END AS 'AI_STATUS', cppi.PUMP_GRP, hct.RGSTR_TIME from TB_HMI_CTR_TAG hct, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_WPP_TAG_CODE wtc where hct.TAG in (cppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, cppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, cppi.CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG) and hct.ANLY_CD in ('RUN','STOP','FREQ') and wtc.DISPLAY_ID='EMSPumpControl' and wtc.FUNC_TYP ='PumpStatus' and wtc.TAG_GRP = cppi.PUMP_GRP and hct.TIME>= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and hct.TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') order by hct.TIME DESC LIMIT 60 OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT RGSTR_TIME, PUMP_GRP, AI_MODE, IS_WORK, CUR_PUMP, PRE_PUMP, FLOW_CTR FROM TB_AI_MODE_RST WHERE RGSTR_TIME >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and RGSTR_TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME ;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_HMI_CTR_TAG hct, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_WPP_TAG_CODE wtc WHERE hct.TAG in (cppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, cppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG) AND hct.ANLY_CD in ('RUN','STOP') AND wtc.DISPLAY_ID='EMSPumpControl' AND wtc.FUNC_TYP ='PumpStatus' AND wtc.TAG_GRP = cppi.PUMP_GRP AND hct.TIME>= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND hct.TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
select OPT_IDX, PRDCT_TIME, PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, PUMP_GRP, PWR_PRDCT, FLAG from TB_CTR_OPT_RST where PRDCT_TIME = #{date} AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND FLAG != '2'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as TS, ROUND(SUM(rhi.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE), 2) AS PWR FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rhi JOIN TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti ON rhi.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG WHERE rhi.value > 0 AND pti.IS_ALL = '1' AND rhi.TS = #{date} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as TS, ROUND(SUM(rhi.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE), 2) AS PWR FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rhi JOIN TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti ON rhi.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG WHERE rhi.value > 0 AND pti.IS_ALL = '1' AND rhi.TS = #{date} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(TS), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as TS, ROUND(AVG(rhi.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE), 2) AS PWR FROM TB_RAWDATA rhi JOIN TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti ON rhi.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG WHERE rhi.value > 0 AND pti.IS_ALL = '1' AND rhi.TS <= #{date} AND rhi.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO TB_CTR_OPT_RST (WPP_CODE, OPT_IDX, ANLY_TIME, PRDCT_TIME, PRDCT_TIME_DIFF, PUMP_GRP, PRDCT_MEAN, PRDCT_STD, TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, PWR_PRDCT, DC_NMB, FLAG) VALUES (#{WPP_CODE}, #{OPT_IDX}, #{ANLY_TIME}, #{PRDCT_TIME}, #{PRDCT_TIME_DIFF}, #{PUMP_GRP}, #{PRDCT_MEAN}, #{PRDCT_STD}, #{TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT}, #{PWR_PRDCT}, #{DC_NMB}, #{FLAG});
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rst.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as rgstr_time, rst.PUMP_YN_RST as 'pre_comb', raw.PUMP_USE_RST as 'cur_comb', rst.FREQ_VALUES as 'pre_freq', raw.SPI_USE_RST as 'cur_freq', rst.FLOW_CTR FROM ( SELECT A.RGSTR_TIME, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN A.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN A.PUMP_IDX END ORDER BY A.PUMP_IDX ASC) AS PUMP_YN_RST, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN A.FREQ != 0 THEN ROUND(A.FREQ) END ORDER BY A.FREQ ASC) AS FREQ_VALUES, A.FLOW_CTR FROM ( SELECT t1.PUMP_IDX, COALESCE(t2.PUMP_YN, t1.PUMP_YN) AS PUMP_YN, COALESCE(t2.RGSTR_TIME, t1.RGSTR_TIME) AS RGSTR_TIME, COALESCE(t2.RATE_CTGRY, 'None') AS RATE_CTGRY, COALESCE(t2.FREQ, t1.FREQ) AS FREQ, COALESCE(t2.FLOW_CTR, 'None') AS FLOW_CTR, CASE WHEN t2.OPT_IDX is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST t1 LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY t2 ON t1.OPT_IDX = t2.OPT_IDX AND t1.PUMP_IDX = t2.PUMP_IDX AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = t2.RGSTR_TIME WHERE t1.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = ( select max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST where RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDate} and RGSTR_TIME > DATE_SUB(#{nowDate}, interval 15 minute) ) ) A GROUP BY A.RGSTR_TIME ) rst LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tr.TS as TS, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN tr.VALUE = 1 THEN tc.PUMP_IDX END ORDER BY tc.PUMP_IDX ASC) AS PUMP_USE_RST, GROUP_CONCAT( CASE WHEN tr.TAGNAME = tc.SPI_TAG AND ROUND(tr.VALUE) != 0 THEN ROUND(tr.VALUE) END ORDER BY tc.PUMP_IDX ASC SEPARATOR ',' ) AS SPI_USE_RST FROM TB_RAWDATA tr JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tc ON tr.TAGNAME = tc.PMB_TAG OR tr.TAGNAME = tc.SPI_TAG WHERE tc.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND tr.TS = (select max(TS) from TB_RAWDATA where TS <= #{nowDate} and TS > DATE_SUB(#{nowDate}, interval 15 minute)) GROUP BY tr.TS ) raw ON rst.RGSTR_TIME = raw.TS GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME;

SELECT MAX(tcpr.RGSTR_TIME) FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST tcpr LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA tr ON tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = tr.TS WHERE tr.TS = ( SELECT MAX(tr2.TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA tr2 WHERE tr2.TS <= NOW() AND tr2.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) );
SELECT * from TB_AI_MODE_RST where RGSTR_TIME >= #{date} AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00.000') AS 'RGSTR_TIME', PUMP_GRP, AI_MODE, IS_WORK, CUR_PUMP, PRE_PUMP, FLOW_CTR from TB_AI_MODE_RST where RGSTR_TIME = #{date} AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}

SELECT AI_MODE FROM TB_AI_MODE_RST WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND RGSTR_TIME >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND RGSTR_TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:00') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00');
